blocking_reasons: The new taxonomy pin check short-circuits before existing verifier checks in `sdk/python/src/attestplane/cli/verify_json.py:593-601` and `sdk/python/src/attestplane/cli/main.py:439-649`, so a bundle that would normally fail with exit 2 (for example `--strict-schema` missing signatures) is downgraded to exit 1 when `--require-taxonomy-version` is wrong. That weakens the release gate and masks stricter verifier failures.
warnings: The added tests only exercise pin mismatch against passing fixtures; they do not cover the downgrade path where a stronger pre-existing verifier failure is masked by the pin check.
validation: Manually reproed the downgrade with `attestplane verify --json --strict-schema tests/fixtures/bundles/missing_signatures.json` returning exit 2, then the same command with `--require-taxonomy-version 0.0.0` returning exit 1 and `att.verify.taxonomy_version_mismatch`.
residual_risks: If this lands without a fix, consumers can treat a structurally invalid bundle as a simple taxonomy-pin mismatch and miss the stronger diagnostic.
